title: Mellow Spicy Greek Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Greek lamb stew with a balance of spicy and tangy flavors, perfect for a lazy Sunday afternoon. This diabetic-friendly dish features panang paste and nuka pickle for added depth.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it starts to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the panang paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chopped nuka pickle, dried oregano, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1.5 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or dill, if desired.
